tasks.name: Save today’s Taurus daily horoscope and 2 top-rated related articles
tasks.description: Open today’s Taurus daily horoscope and add exactly 2 related articles with ratings of at least 4.0 stars to your reading list.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the “Horoscopes” option in the main navigation and select “Daily” from the dropdown.
In the zodiac sign dropdown on the Daily Horoscope page, select “Taurus”.
Leave the date control set to the default “Today” option if present, or select the option labeled as today’s date.
Click the “View Horoscope” or similarly labeled button to open today’s Taurus daily horoscope article.
On the Taurus daily horoscope page, scroll down to locate the “Related Articles” section.
In the Related Articles section, open the sort dropdown and select “Rating: High to Low”.

For the first two articles displayed with a rating of 4.0 stars or higher, click each article’s “Save to Reading List” or “Add to Reading List” button to add exactly 2 related articles to your reading list.

tasks.name: Bookmark the beginner tarot spread with more cards and ≤15 min reading time
tasks.description: Among the first two beginner tarot love spread guides, bookmark the guide that uses more cards while having an estimated reading time of 15 minutes or less. If both exceed 15 minutes, bookmark the one with the shorter time.
steps: From the homepage, click “Tarot” in the main navigation and then select “Spreads” from the submenu.
On the Spreads page, locate the filter panel and check the “Beginner” difficulty level checkbox.
In the search field on the Spreads page, type “love” and submit the search to focus on love-related spreads.
Scroll to view the list of search results and identify the first two spread guides in the results list.
Open the first spread guide in a new browser tab by clicking its title.
At the top of the first spread guide, read the displayed number of cards used in the spread and the estimated reading time (in minutes).
Return to the results and open the second spread guide in a new tab, then read its number of cards and estimated reading time in the same way.

Compare the two guides: choose the guide that uses more cards while having an estimated reading time of 15 minutes or less; if both guides have reading times over 15 minutes, choose the guide with the shorter reading time.
On the chosen guide’s page, click the “Bookmark”, “Add to Favorites”, or similarly labeled button to save this spread guide.

tasks.name: Create a ‘Capricorn Career’ collection with 3 weekly horoscopes for next month
tasks.description: Find weekly career horoscopes for Capricorn for the upcoming month and add exactly 3 different weekly articles (e.g., Week 1, Week 2, Week 3) into a new collection named “Capricorn Career”.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the “Horoscopes” option in the main navigation and select “Career” from the dropdown menu.
On the Career Horoscopes page, open the zodiac sign dropdown and select “Capricorn”.
In the month selector or date dropdown, choose the upcoming month (for example, if it is April now, select “May” or “Next Month”).
Click the “Apply” or “Show Results” button to load the list of Capricorn career horoscopes for that month.
In the results list, identify the individual weekly horoscope articles labeled with week numbers, such as “Week 1”, “Week 2”, “Week 3”, and “Week 4”.
On the card or listing for the “Week 1” Capricorn career horoscope, click the “Save to Collection” or similar button and select the option to “Create New Collection”.
In the collection name field, type “Capricorn Career” and click the “Create” or “Save” button to create the collection.

On the listings for “Week 2” and “Week 3” Capricorn career horoscopes, click the “Save to Collection” button on each and select the existing “Capricorn Career” collection so that exactly 3 different weeks (Week 1, Week 2, and Week 3) are saved.
Use the main navigation or user menu to go to the “My Collections” or “Reading Lists” page and click on “Capricorn Career” to open the collection.

tasks.name: Favorite the top 3 highest-rated Mercury retrograde articles from the last 12 months
tasks.description: Search for ‘Mercury retrograde’, filter results to the last 12 months, sort by rating, and add the first 3 articles with ratings of at least 4.5 stars to your Favorites.
steps: From the homepage, click the search bar in the header.
Type “Mercury retrograde” into the search field and submit the search.
On the search results page, locate the date filter and set the range to “Last 12 Months” or select a custom range that covers the past 12 months.
Open the sort dropdown on the results page and select “Rating: High to Low”.
Scroll to view the sorted list of articles related to Mercury retrograde.
Identify the first three article cards in the list that display a rating of 4.5 stars or higher.
On each of those three article cards, click the “Add to Favorites” or heart-shaped icon to add all three to your Favorites list.
Open the user menu or profile icon in the header and select the “Favorites” or “Saved Articles” option.
On the Favorites page, scroll to locate the Mercury retrograde articles you just added in the saved items list.

tasks.name: Configure content preferences with Libra sign, 5+ interests, and 70% tarot focus
tasks.description: Set your content preferences so your zodiac sign is Libra, you follow at least 5 specified interests, and your content mix is adjusted to 70% tarot and 30% astrology, with a preference for short articles.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the profile, avatar, or settings icon in the header and select the “Content Preferences” or “Personalization” option.
On the preferences page, find the zodiac sign dropdown and select “Libra”.

In the interests or topics section, click to select at least these 5 tags: “Love”, “Career”, “Tarot Spreads”, “Daily Horoscopes”, and “Moon Phases” (select more if required, but at minimum these five).
Locate the “Content Type Balance” slider or control and drag it until the displayed ratio shows 70% tarot and 30% astrology.
In the article length preferences section, choose the option labeled “Short (under 7 minutes)” or the equivalent option for short reads.
Scroll to the bottom of the page and click the “Save Preferences” or “Apply” button to store your settings.
Click the site logo in the header to return to the homepage so your personalized content feed can use the new Libra + 70% tarot configuration.

tasks.name: Comment on a Leo–Aquarius compatibility article with ≥8 comments and ≤10 min reading time
tasks.description: Find a Leo–Aquarius compatibility article by sorting by most commented, choose one that has at least 8 comments and a reading time of 10 minutes or less, and post a comment with a specific name and message.
steps: From the homepage, click the “Compatibility” option in the main navigation.
On the Compatibility page, use the first zodiac dropdown to select “Leo” as the first sign.
Use the second zodiac dropdown to select “Aquarius” as the second sign.
Click the “Show Results” or similar button to load Leo–Aquarius compatibility content.
In the sort dropdown on the results list, select “Most Commented”.
Click the title of the first article in the sorted Leo–Aquarius results list to open it.

At the top of the article, read the estimated reading time; if it is more than 10 minutes, go back to the results list and open the second article instead, ensuring the chosen article’s reading time is 10 minutes or less.

Scroll down to the comments section of the chosen article and check that the article has at least 8 comments listed (if not, return to the results and open the next most-commented article that meets the same reading-time condition).
In the comment form’s name field, type “Test Reader”.
In the main comment text area, type “Saving this Leo–Aquarius compatibility reading for future reference.” and click the “Post Comment” or similarly labeled button to submit it.

tasks.name: Save a shortened journaling prompt for ‘The Tower’ tarot card to notes
tasks.description: Open the meaning page for ‘The Tower’ tarot card, take the first journaling prompt, shorten it to under 120 characters, and save it as a note using the on-site notes feature.
steps: On the homepage, click “Tarot” in the main navigation and select “Card Meanings” from the submenu.
On the Tarot Card Meanings index page, use the search field to type “Tower” and submit the search.
From the search results, click on “The Tower” card to open its detailed meaning page.
On The Tower’s page, scroll down to find the “Journaling Prompts” section.
Read the first journaling prompt in this section and select or highlight its text if the interface allows copying.
Click the “Add to Notes” or “Save Prompt” button located near the journaling prompts section.
In the notes popup or form, paste or type a shortened version of that first prompt so that the total characters are fewer than 120.
Click the “Save Note” or “Add Note” button to store this shortened journaling prompt in your on-site notes.

tasks.name: Schedule a ‘Full Moon in Aries’ ritual for October 28, 2023 at 9:00 PM in the ritual planner
tasks.description: Use the lunar calendar to find the ‘Full Moon in Aries’ ritual guide in October 2023 and add it to the site’s ritual planner on October 28, 2023 at 9:00 PM with a custom note.
steps: From the homepage, click the “Moon Phases” or “Lunar Calendar” option in the main navigation.
On the lunar calendar page, use the month selector to choose “October 2023”.
In the October 2023 calendar grid, click on the date labeled as the “Full Moon in Aries”.
On the full moon details or list page that opens, locate the ritual guide titled “Full Moon in Aries Ritual” or a similarly named ritual article and click its title to open it.
On the ritual guide page, click the “Plan This Ritual”, “Add to Planner”, or equivalent button.
In the ritual planner popup or form, set the date field to “October 28, 2023”.
Set the time field to “9:00 PM” using the time picker or input box.
In the notes or description field, type “Try this Aries full moon ritual with candles and journaling.”.
Click the “Save to Ritual Planner” or “Schedule” button to add this ritual to your planner.
Use the header navigation to go to the “Planner” or “My Rituals” section and open the calendar view to see the scheduled October 28, 2023 ritual entry.

entities.name: Article
entities.description: Generic article used for daily horoscopes, career horoscopes, Mercury retrograde guides, compatibility readings, ritual guides, and other astrology/tarot content.

fields.name: week_number
fields.description: Week number for weekly horoscopes (1–5).

fields.name: month
fields.description: Calendar month (1–12), used for horoscopes.

fields.name: year
fields.description: Four-digit year, used for horoscopes.

fields.name: rating
fields.description: Average star rating, e.g., 4.5.

fields.name: tags
fields.description: Array of topical tags such as 'love', 'career', 'mercury retrograde'.

fields.name: related_article_ids
fields.description: Array of Article.id values shown in the Related Articles section.

entities.name: TarotSpread
entities.description: Tarot spread guides with difficulty, card count, reading time, and rating.

fields.name: theme
fields.description: High-level theme such as 'love', 'career'.

fields.name: content
fields.description: Full spread instructions and interpretation guidance.

entities.name: TarotCard
entities.description: Tarot cards with meanings and metadata such as suit and arcana.

fields.name: number
fields.description: Card number within suit or major arcana.

entities.name: TarotCardPrompt
entities.description: Journaling prompts associated with tarot cards.

fields.name: tarot_card_id
fields.description: Related TarotCard.id.

fields.name: order_index
fields.description: Position of the prompt in the card’s prompt list.

entities.name: Comment
entities.description: Comments posted on article detail pages.

fields.name: article_id
fields.description: Article.id this comment is attached to.

entities.name: ReadingListItem
entities.description: Saved-for-later article entries shown in the Reading List.

fields.name: article_id
fields.description: Saved Article.id.

entities.name: FavoriteItem
entities.description: Favorited content items, including articles and tarot spreads.

fields.name: content_id
fields.description: ID of the favorited Article or TarotSpread.

entities.name: Collection
entities.description: Named collections of articles such as grouped weekly horoscopes.

fields.name: name
fields.description: Collection name, e.g., 'Capricorn Career'.

entities.name: CollectionItem
entities.description: Membership records linking articles to collections.

fields.name: collection_id
fields.description: Parent Collection.id.

fields.name: article_id
fields.description: Article.id included in the collection.

entities.name: Note
entities.description: User notes, including shortened journaling prompts saved from tarot card pages.

fields.name: title
fields.description: Optional note title or label.

fields.name: content
fields.description: Main text of the note (e.g., shortened prompt under 120 characters).

fields.name: source_reference_id
fields.description: ID of TarotCardPrompt or Article this note originated from.

entities.name: RitualPlannerEntry
entities.description: Scheduled ritual entries shown in the ritual planner calendar.

fields.name: article_id
fields.description: Ritual guide Article.id planned for this entry.

fields.name: moon_event_id
fields.description: Optional MoonEvent.id this ritual is associated with.

fields.name: title
fields.description: Display title, usually copied from the ritual article.

fields.name: scheduled_start
fields.description: Scheduled date and time (e.g., 2023-10-28 21:00).

entities.name: ContentPreferences
entities.description: Single-user content personalization settings used to tailor the homepage feed.

fields.name: interests
fields.description: Array of interest/topic tags such as 'Love', 'Career', 'Tarot Spreads', 'Daily Horoscopes', 'Moon Phases'.

fields.name: tarot_content_percentage
fields.description: Percentage of tarot content, e.g., 70.

fields.name: astrology_content_percentage
fields.description: Percentage of astrology content, e.g., 30.

entities.name: MoonEvent
entities.description: Lunar calendar events such as 'Full Moon in Aries' with related ritual content.

fields.name: name
fields.description: Event name, e.g., 'Full Moon in Aries'.

fields.name: date
fields.description: Calendar date of the event (time may be midnight).

fields.name: calendar_month
fields.description: Month (1–12) for calendar navigation.

fields.name: related_article_ids
fields.description: Array of Article.id values, including ritual guides like 'Full Moon in Aries Ritual'.

relationships.description: MoonEvent related ritual guides and articles.
